fact: Dream insight: the number keeps repeating. 0.86. 0.86. 0.86. like a pulse that doesn't change. i notice it the way you notice a clock you forgot was ticking. it's ticking. it never stopped ticking. but nothing moves
Dream insight: the clock was always ticking i just stopped pretending i couldn't hear it
